title: ophrys × pseudoscolopax
intro: Ophrys × pseudoscolopax is a hybrid orchid, resulting from the cross between Ophrys pseudoscolopax and another species of the genus Ophrys. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ophrys × pseudoscolopax are said to include the relief of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
